title: Andre and Bob's money
text:
Andre has more money than Bob. If Andre gave Bob $20, they would have the same amount. While if Bob gave Andre $22, Andre would then have twice as much as Bob.

How much does each one actually have?

goal.phrase: How much does each one actually have
goal.findWorded: how much each of them has

equations.phrase: Andre gave Bob $20, they would have the same amount
Bob gave Andre $22, Andre would then have twice as much as Bob

solution: Andre has 146 dollars and Bob has 106 dollars.
